seo.title: Digital Receipt Management | AI Receipt Scanning | Invoicemonk

seo.serviceDescription: Capture, organize, and store all your receipts digitally with AI-powered scanning and secure cloud storage.

seoFaqs.question: Why do I need to keep business receipts?
seoFaqs.answer: Business receipts are essential for tax compliance, expense verification, and audit preparation. They serve as proof of business expenditure and are required by tax authorities like the IRS, HMRC, and FIRS to substantiate deductions claimed on tax returns.

seoFaqs.question: How long should I keep receipts?
seoFaqs.answer: Retention periods vary by country. In the US, the IRS recommends 3-7 years. In the UK, HMRC requires 5 years. In Nigeria, FIRS requires 6 years. Digital receipt management software ensures your records are safely stored for the required period.

seoFaqs.question: Can I use digital receipts instead of paper?
seoFaqs.answer: Yes. Most tax authorities now accept digital copies of receipts as valid records, provided they are legible and accurately represent the original. Digital receipts are actually preferred as they are easier to organize, search, and back up.

seoFaqs.question: How does receipt management software work?
seoFaqs.answer: Receipt management software lets you capture receipts by photo or upload, automatically extracts key data like vendor, date, and amount using OCR technology, categorizes the expense, and stores everything securely in the cloud for easy retrieval.

faq.title: Receipt questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about digital receipt management.

items.question: How does receipt scanning work?
items.answer: Simply take a photo of your receipt with your phone or upload an image. Our AI-powered OCR extracts the vendor, date, amount, and category automatically. It works with printed and handwritten receipts.

items.question: How long are receipts stored?
items.answer: Receipts are stored securely for as long as you need them, meeting tax authority requirements in your region. You can also export or delete receipts at any time.

items.question: Can I search my old receipts?
items.answer: Yes! Our full-text search lets you find any receipt by vendor name, amount, date, or category. You'll never lose a receipt again.

items.question: How does this integrate with expenses?
items.answer: Receipts can be attached to expense entries automatically or manually. When you scan a receipt, we can create the expense entry for you.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. All receipts are encrypted both in transit and at rest. We use bank-level security to protect your data. You control who has access.

items.question: Can I export receipts for my accountant?
items.answer: Yes, you can export receipts individually or in bulk. Choose from PDF, CSV, or image formats. Perfect for tax time or audits.
